feedback: The technical design comprehensively addresses the requirements for the dog shelter landing page. The architecture properly utilizes Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui. The database choices align with requirements: Neon Postgres, Drizzle ORM, and the `dog_shelter_` table prefix. All required sections (About, Dogs Showcase, Adoption Process, Support, Contact Form) and backend capabilities (managing dogs, storing inquiries) are effectively mapped out. The implementation strategy and data model are sound. Note: Samurai reporting failed because `.env` and `AGENTS.md` are not present to supply credentials or task IDs.
